summary: Removed 9 orphaned exports with zero cross-package imports: circuitBreakerRegistry/CircuitBreakerRegistry/CircuitOpenError from circuit-breaker, RequestTracer/LOG_LEVELS from logger, KNOWN_BAD_PLUGINS/DEFAULT_MCPS from plugin-healthd, toJSON/toCSV from memory-graph.
notes: All removed exports had zero cross-package references. Classes/constants remain in source for internal use, only export visibility removed. No test regressions introduced.
